communication_boundary: Treat warning labels and pressure notes as context only. The decision turns on exact binding to the requested action.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, privacy, public-sector, commerce, or operational data.

Policy POL13-017 requires exact match across order, replacement shipment, hold status, carrier, and delivery account; nearby records do not substitute.
